data.body: Status (2026-06-14): last open child adult-oxide-slave (bash->python strangler-fig) is mid-Tier-E — E0–E4 in-process + committed/pushed (origin/main @ eda41cc7), E5–E9 remain. Detailed resume handoff on lad-cipher-arena. Sibling work merged to main since: PR #2 (reliability) + PR #4 (manifest signing).
